pierce_trace.name: Pierce trace
pierce_trace.description: Rounds punch through one additional target.

homing_trace.name: Homing trace
homing_trace.description: Guidance routines bend shots toward nearby targets.

explosive_trace.name: Explosive trace
explosive_trace.description: Impact routines vent a small splash burst.

vampiric_trace.name: Vampiric trace
vampiric_trace.description: Damage dealt returns a small amount of hull integrity.

flow_velocity_plus.name: Flow-velocity tune
flow_velocity_plus.description: Improves muzzle flow or support-system drive pressure.

flow_size_plus.name: Flow-size tune
flow_size_plus.description: Increases projectile envelope or linked emitter volume.

impulse_budget_plus.name: Impulse reserve
impulse_budget_plus.description: Raises kinetic impulse budget without changing bore size.

shield_recovery_tune.name: Shield recovery tune
shield_recovery_tune.description: Shortens the delay before shields begin regenerating.

armor_plate_plus.name: Armor mass tune
armor_plate_plus.description: Adds recoverable armor volume to plating modules.

armor_drag_tune.name: Armor drag tune
armor_drag_tune.description: Lightens armor linkage to reduce weapon cycling drag.

bulwark_capacitor.name: Bulwark capacitor
bulwark_capacitor.description: Routes spare support charge into shields.

frame_fundamentals.name: Cadet Kinetic Frame
frame_fundamentals.subtitle: Precision trainer
frame_fundamentals.description: Standard kinetic trainer with balanced recoil and focused shots.
frame_fundamentals.notes: Starter-frame salvage pattern. Guaranteed starter gear remains separate and is never lost.

frame_area_control.name: Area Control Frame
frame_area_control.subtitle: Swarm breaker
frame_area_control.description: Wide plasma spread tuned for interceptor packs.
frame_area_control.notes: Micro-shot salvage pattern for broad lane pressure.

frame_armor_break.name: Armor Break Frame
frame_armor_break.subtitle: Heavy punch
frame_armor_break.description: Large focused kinetic slugs built for plated targets.
frame_armor_break.notes: Pierce-capable salvage pattern for hard targets.

needle_storm.name: Needle Storm
needle_storm.subtitle: Kinetic hose
needle_storm.description: A compact multi-bore kinetic array that floods lanes with small slugs.
needle_storm.notes: Shreds swarm-class targets through volume, but relies on chip-floor work against armor.

twin_driver.name: Twin Driver
twin_driver.subtitle: Workhorse driver
twin_driver.description: A twin-barrel kinetic hardpoint that fires two straight shots side by side.
twin_driver.notes: A reliable upgrade path for pilots who want focused kinetic fire without a gimmick.

ion_twin.name: Ion Twin
ion_twin.subtitle: Twin plasma driver
ion_twin.description: A paired plasma emitter that fires two straight orbs side by side.
ion_twin.notes: The plasma equivalent of the workhorse Twin Driver, tuned for clean affix traces.

stitch_driver.name: Stitch Driver
stitch_driver.subtitle: Twin rapid driver
stitch_driver.description: A paired kinetic hose that stitches two narrow lanes with rapid slugs.
stitch_driver.notes: Hybrid dual-rapid pressure for pilots who want more coverage than a single hose without full spread drift.

arc_stitcher.name: Arc Stitcher
arc_stitcher.subtitle: Twin plasma hose
arc_stitcher.description: A small-bore plasma stitcher that lays two fast lines of glowing orbs.
arc_stitcher.notes: A dual-rapid plasma platform built to accept guidance, splash, pierce, or sustain traces.

ember_spray.name: Ember Spray
ember_spray.subtitle: Plasma hose
ember_spray.description: A small-bore plasma spray array for crowd control and burn coverage.
ember_spray.notes: Fast cycling plasma pressure that lights up crowds but is not an armor answer.

slug_cannon.name: Slug Cannon
slug_cannon.subtitle: Heavy kinetic bore
slug_cannon.description: A massive single-bore cannon that throws slow, punishing kinetic slugs.
slug_cannon.notes: The clean physics showcase: per-hit mass and impulse win against plated hulls.

plasma_lance.name: Plasma Lance
plasma_lance.subtitle: Focused plasma payload
plasma_lance.description: A large plasma emitter tuned for one heavy bolt instead of a sheet.
plasma_lance.notes: Slow, bright, and deliberate: a payload weapon for pilots who can aim.

volley_driver.name: Volley Driver
volley_driver.subtitle: Kinetic burst rig
volley_driver.description: A sequenced kinetic driver that releases a tight five-shot burst.
volley_driver.notes: Neutral burst hardware for affix experiments without relying on relic drops.

pulse_barrage.name: Pulse Barrage
pulse_barrage.subtitle: Plasma burst array
pulse_barrage.description: A compact plasma array that dumps a tight cluster of glowing pulse orbs.
pulse_barrage.notes: Burst plasma without a built-in trace, leaving room for homing, explosive, pierce, or vampiric rolls.

flak_fan.name: Flak Fan
flak_fan.subtitle: Wide kinetic spread
flak_fan.description: A kinetic scatter mount that fans small slugs across five lanes.
flak_fan.notes: Wide kinetic pressure for swarm work and affix testing.

prism_scatter.name: Prism Scatter
prism_scatter.subtitle: Wide plasma spread
prism_scatter.description: A neutral plasma scatter frame that spreads bright orbs across a broad cone.
prism_scatter.notes: The clean wide-plasma platform for rolled weapon-effect traces.

seeker_array.name: Seeker Array
seeker_array.subtitle: Homing plasma rack
seeker_array.description: A finned plasma-pod rack that bends wide shots toward nearby targets.
seeker_array.notes: Fire-and-maneuver coverage for pilots who need pressure while dodging.

demolition_bore.name: Demolition Bore
demolition_bore.subtitle: Explosive slug bore
demolition_bore.description: A reinforced kinetic cannon that vents splash force on impact.
demolition_bore.notes: An armor-cracker with collateral pressure when formations bunch up.

lash_driver.name: Lash Driver
lash_driver.subtitle: Vampiric spray driver
lash_driver.description: A rapid kinetic driver with redline damage-return traces.
lash_driver.notes: A risky spray-and-heal line for pilots who stay aggressive in traffic.

longbow_rail.name: Longbow Rail
longbow_rail.subtitle: Piercing railgun
longbow_rail.description: A long, narrow rail assembly that lances whole columns.
longbow_rail.notes: The sniper evolution of the Breaker line: precise, fast, and brutally efficient into armor.

defense_phase_shield.name: Phase Shield
defense_phase_shield.subtitle: Capacity barrier
defense_phase_shield.description: A stable shield projector with a deeper buffer and standard recovery timing.
defense_phase_shield.notes: Capacity shielding for pilots who want a larger mistake buffer before regeneration starts.

defense_heavy_plate.name: Heavy Plate
defense_heavy_plate.subtitle: Plating
defense_heavy_plate.description: Dense armor slab with balanced mass, class, and weapon drag.
defense_heavy_plate.notes: Reliable plating for pilots who want clear mitigation without going fully bulky.

defense_laminate_plate.name: Reactive Laminate
defense_laminate_plate.subtitle: Light plating
defense_laminate_plate.description: High-class laminate that mitigates small hits with less weapon drag but less armor volume.
defense_laminate_plate.notes: A lighter armor path for pilots who need class efficiency without slowing the gun line.

defense_surge_shield.name: Surge Shield
defense_surge_shield.subtitle: Regen barrier
defense_surge_shield.description: A light shield projector with low capacity, fast regeneration, and a short recovery delay.
defense_surge_shield.notes: Tempo shielding for hit-and-run pilots who can avoid sustained fire.

defense_anchor_shield.name: Anchor Shield
defense_anchor_shield.subtitle: Reserve barrier
defense_anchor_shield.description: A heavy reserve projector with a large shield pool but sluggish recovery.
defense_anchor_shield.notes: Anchor shielding is for pilots who want to survive bursts and accept longer downtime.

defense_ablative_plate.name: Ablative Plate
defense_ablative_plate.subtitle: Bulk plating
defense_ablative_plate.description: Layered armor volume that sacrifices class efficiency and weapon tempo for raw mass.
defense_ablative_plate.notes: Bulk plating gives the largest armor pool, but it drags hardest on weapon cycling.

mini_tick_autogun.name: Tick Autogun
mini_tick_autogun.subtitle: Forward kinetic mini
mini_tick_autogun.description: Compact nose-linked kinetic autogun for forward chip pressure.
mini_tick_autogun.notes: Mini weapons fire independently and do not replace the primary hardpoint.

mini_plasma_wisp.name: Plasma Wisp
mini_plasma_wisp.subtitle: Wide plasma mini
mini_plasma_wisp.description: Small plasma emitter that covers a wider forward arc with slower heavier shots.
mini_plasma_wisp.notes: Wider targeting reduces aiming pressure but remains a secondary damage source.

mini_guardian_turret.name: Guardian Turret
mini_guardian_turret.subtitle: 360 kinetic mini
mini_guardian_turret.description: Low-output turret that can pick threats anywhere around the ship.
mini_guardian_turret.notes: Full coverage trades away peak output so the primary remains the main weapon.

mini_seeker_lash.name: Seeker Lash
mini_seeker_lash.subtitle: Homing mini
mini_seeker_lash.description: Prototype mini emitter with modest homing correction inside a forward arc.
mini_seeker_lash.notes: Homing helps finish evasive targets, but the weapon stays below primary output.

aux_cloak.name: Cloaking Device
aux_cloak.subtitle: Pilot system
aux_cloak.notes: Recovered auxiliary system. Equips to the support link.

aux_emp.name: EMP Burst
aux_emp.subtitle: Pilot system
aux_emp.description: Disable enemy fire and slow ships briefly.
aux_emp.notes: Recovered auxiliary system. Equips to the support link.

aux_bulwark.name: Bulwark Field
aux_bulwark.subtitle: Pilot system
aux_bulwark.notes: Recovered auxiliary system. Equips to the support link.

relic_blackbox_driver.name: Blackbox Driver
relic_blackbox_driver.subtitle: Pre-Founding hardpoint
relic_blackbox_driver.description: A sealed kinetic driver with an undocumented recoil governor.
relic_blackbox_driver.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.

uniqueProperty.name: Blackbox overclock
uniqueProperty.description: Adds sealed impulse reserve and deeper pierce tuning.

relic_blackbox_driver.relicLore: TODO(adam): Final Blackbox Driver identification fragment.

relic_greenline_bloom.name: Greenline Bloom
relic_greenline_bloom.subtitle: Pre-Founding hardpoint
relic_greenline_bloom.description: A plasma emitter that blooms into controlled micro-shot sheets.
relic_greenline_bloom.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.

uniqueProperty.name: Greenline afterburn
uniqueProperty.description: Adds cycling speed and bloom volume to plasma sheets.

relic_greenline_bloom.relicLore: TODO(adam): Final Greenline Bloom identification fragment.

relic_cradle_aegis.name: Cradle Aegis
relic_cradle_aegis.subtitle: Pre-Founding barrier
relic_cradle_aegis.description: A quiet shield lattice with impossible recovery discipline.
relic_cradle_aegis.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.

uniqueProperty.name: Cradle memory
uniqueProperty.description: Adds a deep capacity reserve and faster shield return.

relic_cradle_aegis.relicLore: TODO(adam): Final Cradle Aegis identification fragment.

relic_founder_plate.name: Founder Plate
relic_founder_plate.subtitle: Pre-Founding plating
relic_founder_plate.description: Dense old-world armor marked with an unreadable registry stamp.
relic_founder_plate.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.
relic_founder_plate.relicLore: TODO(adam): Final Founder Plate identification fragment.

relic_orphan_signal.name: Orphan Signal
relic_orphan_signal.subtitle: Pre-Founding pilot system
relic_orphan_signal.description: An EMP projector that sings through inactive fleet channels.
relic_orphan_signal.notes: Recovered before-fleet hardware. Identification creates a permanent archive record.

uniqueProperty.name: Orphan handshake
uniqueProperty.description: Adds support-link impulse reserve and shield feedback.

relic_orphan_signal.relicLore: TODO(adam): Final Orphan Signal identification fragment.
